sections.paragraph:
ἄκρατος, ον (κεράννυμι; since Hom., who has ἄκρητος; LXX; PsSol 8:14; TestSol 18:31; Philo; Jos., Ant. 17, 103) unmixed οἶνος (Od. 24, 73; Hdt. 1, 207; Posidon.: 87 Fgm. 15, 4 Jac. 22; 3 Macc 5:2) fig. (cp. POxy 237 VII, 40 ἄκρατος τῶν νόμων ἀποτομία) of God’s anger in full strength Rv 14:10 (cp. Jer 32:15; Ps 74:9;PsSol PsSol:8, 14. On ‘mixed/unmixed’ wine s. BBandstra, Wine: ISBE IV 1070 and 1072 [bibl.]; s. also RCharles, ICC Rv ad loc. ἀκρ. is found w. ὀργή Aeschyl., Prom. 678; Alcidamas [IV b.c.] in Aristot., Rhet. 1406a, 10; Jos., Ant. 5, 150; 17, 148).—DELG s.v. κεράννυμι. M-M.

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

PsSol PsSol = Psalms of Solomon—List 2

TestSol TestSol = Testament of Solomon, I–III a.d.—List 2

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

Od Od , s. Hom.; VIII? b.c.—List 5

Hdt. Hdt. = Herodotus, V b.c.—List 5

Posidon Posidon , II–I b.c.—List 5

Fgm. Fgm. = fragment, fragmentary

Jac. Jac. = Die Fragmente der griechischen Historiker, ed. FJacoby—Lists 5, 6

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

POxy POxy = Oxyrhynchus Papyri—List 4

ISBE ISBE = International Standard Bible Encyclopedia, rev. ed.—List 6

ICC ICC = International Critical Commentary—List 6

Aeschyl Aeschyl , V b.c.—List 5

Alcidamas Alcidamas , IV b.c.—List 5

Aristot Aristot , various works, IV b.c.—List 5

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 38
